name: mulesoft-to-aws-migration-assistant
description: Full-stack prototype web application to migrate MuleSoft projects to AWS native services

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend"
